slots.caption_ig:
Date night is a different scoring problem. Ambiance: 30%. Pacing: 20%. Loudness ceiling: 75dB. One dish you'll fight over: required. We added a date-night filter that weights all of these. Use it.

#ForkFox #DateNight #FoodAI #PhillyEats #BayAreaEats
slots.caption_fb: Picking a date-night spot isn't the same as picking lunch. You need ambiance, pacing, a noise floor that doesn't kill conversation, and at least one dish memorable enough to bring up six months later. Our date-night filter weights all of these — not just cuisine and rating.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Editorial photograph of a candlelit dinner table for two. Half-eaten dish, two wineglasses, low warm light. Square 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 8s. Two hands clinking wine glasses over a candlelit table. Soft jazz piano (no vocals). Text fades in: 'Date night, scored.'
